Product Details
O-Rings

Standardized sealing rings for static and dynamic sealing applications across industrial systems.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

O-Rings

Widely used for reliable sealing in pneumatic, hydraulic, and mechanical assemblies.

CHX O-Rings are available in multiple compounds and hardness levels to support durability, pressure resistance, and long service life.

Material Options

NBR, FKM, silicone, and other compounds for different media and temperatures.

Stable Sealing

Designed for dependable sealing performance in static grooves and mechanical joints.

Flexible Sizing

Supports standard and custom dimensions for diverse industrial equipment.
